_fixture_note: Real output from 2026-07-20 against RAW.DQ_TEST_CHILD, a deliberately-built 5-row table with genuine violations of all four kinds at once: a duplicated key (PRIMARY_KEY=2 appears twice), an out-of-range value (QUANTITY=500 vs a 1-100 bound), an orphaned foreign key (PARENT_REF=99 has no matching row in the real parent table RAW.DQ_TEST_PARENT), and a malformed email. This closes the last open live-verification gap in this skill: every check had only ever been proven on CLEAN real tables before this.
